title: Amtech A3600 10 Piece nuisance dust mask set
features: COMFORTABLE: These lightweight, disposable ‘nuisance use’ masks have elasticated straps and are comfortable to wear
APPLICATIONS: They are ideal for clearing garages, attics and other dusty areas, as well as for general decorating jobs
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Easy to store, making it a practical addition to any toolbox.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 10pc mask set See more
